---
name: Enhacement request
about: Suggest an idea for existing component
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: yousif-khalil-abdulkarim

---

**Is your enhancement related to an existing component? Please describe.**
Describe which component (e.g., cache, event bus, file storage, etc.) you want to enhance. For example, you may want to add an idempotence cache to the event-bus component to prevent duplicate event processing, or add a new adapter to an existing component. Explain the current limitation or missing adapter/feature.

**Describe the new adapter or feature you'd like to add**
Provide a clear and concise description of the new adapter (e.g., a new cache backend) or feature you want to add to the existing component. Include details about its purpose and expected behavior.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
List any alternative approaches, existing adapters, or features you considered, and explain why they are not sufficient.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, references, or relevant information (such as links to similar implementations, screenshots, or use cases) that would help understand the enhancement request.
